ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate (e.g., D for Democrat, R for Republican) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the candidate represents */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "office_held" TEXT /* Current or previous office held by the candidate */,
  "year_elected" INTEGER /* Year the candidate was elected */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the candidate's term */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the candidate's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the candidate */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the candidate's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_financing" (
  "financing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financing record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate receiving the financing */,
  "amount_supported" REAL /* Total amount received from interest groups that supported the candidate */,
  "amount_opposed" REAL /* Total amount received from interest groups that opposed the candidate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial contribution */,
  "cycle" TEXT /* Election cycle (e.g., 2020, 2022) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the contribution (e.g., individual, PAC, corporation) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the interest group */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date of the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., cash, in-kind) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_financing_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_records" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate who voted */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote cast by the candidate (e.g., Yes, No, Not Voting) */,
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific piece of legislation */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "legislation_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislation */,
  "legislation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the legislation */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., roll call, voice vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest group */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of interest group (e.g., NGO, corporation, PAC) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the interest group */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the interest group's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the interest group */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the interest group */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the interest group was founded */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the interest group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_interest_groups" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate associated with the interest group */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interest group associated with the candidate */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate was associated with the interest group */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., supporter, opponent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_interest_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES interest_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_interest_groups_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
